title: Archive verb: decisions archive + --all union reads (D4c)
action: Per CONTEXT D4c: new `decisions archive` verb moves superseded/redacted events (always) plus decide events strictly older than an explicit --before <ISO date> (never a default purge) from .bee/decisions.jsonl to .bee/decisions-archive.jsonl, all-or-nothing under the store lock (mirror the cells archive journaled-txn pattern). Refuses (typed) when nothing qualifies. `decisions search`/`active` gain --all to read the union (active file first, then archive, de-duplicated by id, ordering preserved newest-first). activeDecisions default behavior (no --all) is byte-identical to today for an unarchived store. Idempotent: second archive run with same args is a clean no-op. Mirror to .bee/bin, extend tests (archive split, union read, idempotency, missing archive file, concurrent log-vs-archive under lock), render + manifest.

truths: archive is all-or-nothing under the store lock
search --all reaches archived events; default search unchanged for unarchived stores
prohibitions: No default age window — --before is explicit or the verb refuses
Never rewrite surviving active events (append-only integrity)
